texto: Was Giza the mirror of the sky? In addition, what was the number 137 purpose? The number 137 has a very amazing meaning and it can range from modern Science to Kabbalah, from Archetypes numerology to Eastern philosophy, from smaller particles to the law of Universal Balance. ... Did the builders want to convey their scientific knowledge through the Pyramids proportions? ... Was their function connected to the number 137?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Armando Mei que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Was Giza the mirror of the sky? In addition, what was the number 137 purpose? The number 137 has …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, fine-structure-constant, great-pyramid, com foco em great-pyramid e science.
